items.name: Basic Tune-Up
items.description: Brake lever adjustment, cable tension, derailleur indexing, tire pressure, and safety inspection. Perfect for seasonal refresh.

items.name: Standard Tune-Up
items.description: Everything in Basic plus drivetrain cleaning, wheel truing, and bearing check. Recommended annually.

items.name: Full Overhaul
items.description: Complete disassembly, clean every component, regrease all bearings, replace worn cables and housing. Like new.
